title: Internal Operating Support Packet 002

fields.vision: This page records that the operating system includes internal capacity and continuity supports, but the public version deliberately abstracts the private contents.
fields.mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
fields.built_components: Abstract-only public record; not a public exhibit
fields.source_utilization: Writing, rhetoric, narrative design, visual culture, and presentation. Use source library writing/visual/cinema sources to strengthen public exposition and Trilogy visual/storytelling logic. Vision: Make public pages read as curated intellectual exhibits rather than dashboards. Mechanism: Extract narrative sequencing, visual perception, close reading, rhetoric, style, cinema, and presentation mechanisms. Plan: Apply after domain-source routing so style clarifies evidence rather than masking weak evidence. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need selective close-reading before adopting style doctrine. Source pool: 64 deduplicated local title candidates; 61 catalogue support rows. Examples: Narrative and Narration: Analyzing Cinematic Storytelling; Camera Lucida. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors where available. This strengthens page vision, mechanism, source-use, plan, and gap language, but it does not certify passage-level citation support. source-library controlled content is source evidence for internal scholarship and planning; do not redistribute source files or long excerpts in the public package.
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. Keep the underlying packet private. If it ever becomes public, rewrite it as a separate professional specification with no private operating details. Use this entry only to explain that MuranoOS separates public project work from internal continuity systems, and that private-support packets do not become public evidence pages by default.
fields.status: Abstract-only public record; not a public exhibit
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain as private infrastructure. Do not promote, quote, or expand this packet in the public site unless it is rewritten from first principles as professional operating methodology.
fields.detailed_source_vision: This page records that the operating system includes internal capacity and continuity supports, but the public version deliberately abstracts the private contents. The professional claim is only that such supports exist as part of project continuity, review, and execution infrastructure.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: This page records that the operating system includes internal capacity and continuity supports, but the public version deliberately abstracts the private contents.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: Its value is internal continuity, not public display: it preserves operating context that can support later rooms without being mistaken for a finished public project.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: blueprint detailed source fields.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

researcher_process_map.final_use_case: Its value is internal continuity, not public display: it preserves operating context that can support later rooms without being mistaken for a finished public project.
